title: The Sound of Rain
description: Material based sound effects when it rains and some cool thunder
body:
# **💧The Sound of Rain💧**
The sound of rain is a mod that is focused on realistic material based sounds, instead of the generic default minecraft rain. unique audio will play when near the following blocks:

- Amesthyst✨
- Metals🔩
- Foliage (plants or leaves)🍃
- Fabrics🧶
- Glass 🪟
- Wood🪵
- Lava🌋
- Water🌊
- And add your own blocks via configuration:)
- With more comming!

Perfect for: Building atmospheric bases and structures, creating immersive gameplay experiences, adding depth to rainy day exploration, builders who want realistic audio feedback from their material choices, or whatever you do in Minecraft. Inspired by [Cool rain](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cool-rain) from JaizYT for Fabric.


# Video Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nVe7P1Fg94w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Installation:

Currently in forge 1.20.1/1.20.4, soon more ports will come.
make sure forge 1.20.1/1.20.4 is installed, then add it to the mods folder, then start minecraft, then start the rain, then listen...

This mod is for client side, only the player needs it

## info
I was playing on my modpack of 135 mods, but something was missing, it was untouched by anything: The weather. So i had to change it somehow. I really enjoyed making this and i want to improve on it. If you like my work you can buy me a [coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/jshep):

Planned feature are:
- Material sound effects✔
- Overhauled thunder sounds✔
- Occasional wind sounds
- Wood sounds✔
- Sand sounds✔
- Stone sounds
- Chance for a rainbow after rain
- Hissing Lava✔
- Water sounds✔
- Muddy footstep sounds when walking grass and... mud
- Angled rain
- Lightning Interaction Sounds: Custom sounds if lightning hits a specific block
- Better sound placement on the block✔
- Configuration for sounds✔
